__rationale__: Triggering fixture for MR-58: rare-codon-aware host suggestion. Construct expresses an unoptimised eukaryotic cargo ORF (mammalian source) with CAI < 0.5 against the E. coli K12 codon table AND 3 windowed 6-codon rare-cluster hits, in DH5alpha (rare_codon_supplementation = []). Expected eventual outcome (Phase 5/6): SOFT warning recommending Rosetta(DE3); v0.2 stub returns INFO.

construct.notes: T-414 fixture asserts rule-registry coverage for MR-58. Phase 5/6 replaces stub semantics with executable predicate expectations (CAI + rare-cluster scan vs host.rare_codon_supplementation cross-check).
